post.content: Can someone please post any LLD questions you have faced during the recent Uber interview process. Typically this will be the 2nd round in uber interview process.\n\nThanks in advance.

Design a stock matching system
- each stock has a symbol
- there will be buy orders and sell orders
- match orders which are nearest
- code should be running properly

- we can use strategy pattern to apply matching strategy
- here they are not looking for the most optimal DS and Algo, but rather your thinking and coding skills
Design railway seat booking app where a seat can be booked for destination A to B then other passenger can book it from B to C.
Are you done with your interview? What did they ask?

Not sure but do they expect fully working LLD code or even if we come up with objects and services and relationship along with some code is fine ??\nOP or anyone having knowledge on this please do give a reply.
